issue: I am trying to sync my Outlook calendar with Cascade CRM but I keep getting a '403 Forbidden' error after I authorize the app.
resolution: User had not enabled 'External API Access' in their Microsoft 365 admin center. Instructed user to toggle the permission. Verified sync success after change.

issue: How do I export my lead list to a CSV file? I only see the option for PDF.
resolution: Navigated user to the 'Leads' tab, clicked the 'Bulk Actions' dropdown, and selected 'Export as CSV'. Explained that the PDF option they saw was for individual lead summaries.

issue: Our team's dashboard is showing 'Data Load Error' for the last 2 hours. Is there a service outage?
resolution: Investigated regional shard US-EAST-1. Found a temporary latency spike. Service was restored automatically. Advised user to clear browser cache and retry.

issue: Can I set up an automated email to go out 3 days after a lead is moved to the 'Qualified' stage?
resolution: Guided user to 'Workflows' -> 'Create New'. Trigger: Stage Change (Qualified). Action: Delay (3 days). Sub-action: Send Email Template. Provided documentation link for Workflow triggers.

issue: I accidentally deleted a contact named 'Robert Miller'. Can this be recovered?
resolution: Used the 'Trash' recovery tool within the Settings > Data Management menu. Restored contact 'Robert Miller' (ID: 55921). Reminded user that items in Trash are purged after 30 days.

issue: The mobile app is crashing whenever I try to upload a photo to a deal note.
resolution: Identified version mismatch on iOS. User was on v2.1.2. Instructed upgrade to v2.2.0. Verified that the multipart/form-data fix in the latest version resolved the crash.

issue: I need to change my billing address from 123 Maple St to 456 Oak Ave.
resolution: Updated billing record in Stripe and synced back to CRM account settings. Confirmed change with user via email.

issue: Is there a limit on how many custom fields I can add to a Deal?
resolution: Informed user that the Professional plan allows up to 100 custom fields per object. They currently have 12. Advised on best practices for naming conventions.

issue: I'm trying to use the API to fetch all tasks, but I'm only getting 20 results back even though we have hundreds.
resolution: Explained pagination logic. The /tasks endpoint defaults to 20 per page. Instructed user to use the ?page= and ?per_page= parameters or check the 'next_page_url' in the JSON response.

issue: One of my team members cannot see the 'Revenue' report. They have the 'Sales Rep' role.
resolution: The 'Sales Rep' role does not have 'View Financials' permission by default. Created a custom role 'Senior Sales' with the required permission and assigned it to the user.

issue: Slack notifications for new deals aren't working since this morning.
resolution: Checked Slack OAuth token status. Token was revoked. Re-authenticated the Slack integration in the Integrations panel. Sent test notification to confirm fix.

issue: Can I merge two duplicate contact records?
resolution: Yes, selected both contacts in the Contact list view and clicked 'Merge'. Selected the master record to retain data. Merged successfully.

issue: The 'Last Activity' date on my leads isn't updating when I send an email through Gmail (synced).
resolution: Found that the user had 'Track Activities' disabled in the Gmail Integration settings. Enabled the setting. Retroactive sync started for last 24 hours.

issue: I need to import 5,000 leads from an Excel file. What is the limit?
resolution: Import limit is 50,000 rows per CSV upload. 5,000 is well within limits. Provided the standard CSV template for mapping headers.

issue: My password reset link isn't arriving in my inbox.
resolution: Verified email status in SendGrid logs. Email was dropped due to a previous 'Unsubscribe' from marketing emails. Cleared the suppression list for this user and resent the link.

issue: Is there a way to see which users have logged in over the last 7 days?
resolution: Directed user to Settings > Security > Audit Logs. Filtered by 'Login' event and date range. Exported the list for the user.

issue: I'm getting a 'Validation Error: Invalid Currency' when creating a deal via Zapier.
resolution: The Zapier payload was sending 'USD' but the CRM account was set to 'GBP'. Updated the Zap to use the correct currency code matching the account settings.

issue: How do I delete a custom pipeline stage that has active deals in it?
resolution: Explained that deals must be moved to another stage first. Assisted user in bulk-moving 15 deals from 'Old Stage' to 'Discovery'. Deleted the 'Old Stage' successfully.

issue: The API documentation for /contacts/search seems to be missing the 'sort' parameter details.
resolution: Confirmed documentation gap. Updated the Swagger docs to include 'sort_by' and 'sort_order' parameters. Provided example: ?sort_by=created_at&sort_order=desc.

issue: Our company logo isn't appearing on the invoices we send through Cascade.
resolution: Checked 'Brand Settings'. The uploaded file was a .TIFF which is not supported for web rendering in invoices. Converted logo to .PNG and re-uploaded. Verified on test invoice.
